segments.text: Answer me when I call, O God of my righteousness! You have relieved my distress; show me grace and hear my prayer.
How long, O men, will my honor be maligned? How long will you love vanity and seek after lies? Selah
Know that the LORD has set apart the godly for Himself; the LORD hears when I call to Him.
Be angry, yet do not sin;  on your bed, search your heart and be still. Selah
Offer the sacrifices of the righteous and trust in the LORD.
Who can show us the good?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Shine the light of Your face upon us, O LORD.
You have filled my heart with more joythan when grain and new wine abound.
I will lie down and sleep in peace, for You alone, O LORD, make me dwell in safety.
